chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.15 of 2022 Muhammad Iqbal Qamar Siddique Versus Muhammad Jameel Siddiqui & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 479/22 2. For order on office objection/reply ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA 480/22 4. For hearing of main case. 5. For orders on CMA 481/22 Dated: 18.10.2023 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Azar for appellant. -.-.- 1) This appeal is barred by time as conceded by the appellant’s counsel. This is an application under section 5 of the Limitation Act supported by affidavit of appellant Muhammad Iqbal Qamar Siddiqui, however, no excuses/explanation have been made available for the consideration of this Court, except an oral statement that he (appellant) was not well. There is no document i.e. prescription or medical certificate etc. attached to supplement such contention. Even during course of arguments, learned counsel has not been able to give a plausible explanation as to the delay in filing instant appeal. Instant application for condonation of delay is accordingly dismissed. Since appeal is barred by time, as observed above, the same is accordingly dismissed along with pending applications. Judge Judge
